name: @lms/admin
description: AWS GenAI Prep — Admin Panel (Vuexy Next.js child theme)
notes: Run 'npm run setup-vuexy' first to initialize the Vuexy starter-kit base.
NEVER edit files in src/@core/ or src/@layouts/ — those are managed by Vuexy.
All customizations go in src/@custom/ only.
To update Vuexy: update the source, then run 'npm run sync-vuexy'.
